Cash Balance.definition: Total book cash balance across bank accounts.

Available Cash.definition: Cash balance net of restricted cash.

Restricted Cash.definition: Restricted bank cash not available for operating liquidity.

Available Liquidity.definition: Available cash plus undrawn credit facilities.

Minimum Cash Buffer.definition: Entity minimum cash covenant or operating buffer.

Liquidity Headroom.definition: Available liquidity above minimum cash buffer.

Overdue AR.definition: Open AR balance past due date.

Overdue AR %.definition: Overdue AR as a percentage of total AR outstanding.

AP Due 14 Days.definition: AP outstanding due in the next 14 days.

Revenue.definition: Monthly revenue used for DSO denominator.

COGS.definition: Monthly cost of goods sold used for DPO and DIO denominators.

DSO.definition: Days sales outstanding, based on AR balance over revenue.

DPO.definition: Days payable outstanding, based on AP balance over COGS.

DIO.definition: Days inventory outstanding, based on inventory balance over COGS.

Forecast Closing Cash.definition: Projected closing cash over the selected 13-week forecast scenario.

Forecast Payments.definition: Forecast supplier, payroll, capex, and debt payments.

Cash Runway Weeks.definition: Available liquidity divided by average weekly cash burn when net flow is negative.

Forecast Error %.definition: Absolute forecast error divided by absolute actual net cash flow.

FX Net Exposure.definition: Gross net FX exposure in USD equivalent.

Unhedged FX Exposure.definition: FX exposure remaining after hedge coverage.

Unhedged FX %.definition: Unhedged exposure divided by total net FX exposure.

Open Risk Value.definition: Value attached to non-closed treasury action items.

Open Risk Count.definition: Count of non-closed treasury risk action items.

Latest Complete Month.definition: Latest complete monthly period used by Project 20-style KPI cards.

Available Liquidity KPI Card SVG.definition: Project 20-style SVG KPI card for Available Liquidity; includes current value, prior comparison, delta, and mini trend.

Liquidity Headroom KPI Card SVG.definition: Project 20-style SVG KPI card for Liquidity Headroom; includes current value, prior comparison, delta, and mini trend.

Forecast Net Flow KPI Card SVG.definition: Project 20-style SVG KPI card for 13W Net Flow; includes current value, prior comparison, delta, and mini trend.

Cash Runway KPI Card SVG.definition: Project 20-style SVG KPI card for Cash Runway; includes current value, prior comparison, delta, and mini trend.

AR Outstanding KPI Card SVG.definition: Project 20-style SVG KPI card for AR Outstanding; includes current value, prior comparison, delta, and mini trend.

Overdue AR KPI Card SVG.definition: Project 20-style SVG KPI card for Overdue AR %; includes current value, prior comparison, delta, and mini trend.

AP Due 14 Days KPI Card SVG.definition: Project 20-style SVG KPI card for AP Due 14d; includes current value, prior comparison, delta, and mini trend.

Cash Conversion KPI Card SVG.definition: Project 20-style SVG KPI card for Cash Conversion; includes current value, prior comparison, delta, and mini trend.

Forecast Closing Cash KPI Card SVG.definition: Project 20-style SVG KPI card for Closing Cash; includes current value, prior comparison, delta, and mini trend.

Forecast Error KPI Card SVG.definition: Project 20-style SVG KPI card for Forecast Error; includes current value, prior comparison, delta, and mini trend.

Unhedged FX KPI Card SVG.definition: Project 20-style SVG KPI card for Unhedged FX %; includes current value, prior comparison, delta, and mini trend.

Open Risk KPI Card SVG.definition: Project 20-style SVG KPI card for Open Risks; includes current value, prior comparison, delta, and mini trend.

Current Lens SVG.definition: Compact Project 20-style lens showing selected region, entity count, and scenario.

Treasury Decision Chips SVG.definition: Decision chips for the Treasury Command Center page.

Working Capital Decision Chips SVG.definition: Decision chips for the Working Capital Control page.

Risk Decision Chips SVG.definition: Decision chips for the Forecast, FX and Risk page.
